metadata.description: Server-side GameAdapter implementation for Disney Lorcana — wires the Lorcana engine, cards data, and format validators into the @tcg/shared/game-adapter contract.
Renderer-agnostic player interaction view-model derived from the Lorcana engine's projected board

metadata.scriptContent: bun run format && bun run lint && bun run check-types && bun run test
bun run i18n:compile && svelte-kit sync && svelte-package && publint
pnpm run i18n:compile && pnpm run i18n:check
svelte-kit sync && AGENT=1 bun test --silent src/lib
RUN_STRATEGY_LAB=1 STRATEGY_PRESET=quick AGENT=1 bun test --silent src/testing/ai-strategy/*.test.ts
RUN_STRATEGY_LAB=1 STRATEGY_PRESET=candidate AGENT=1 bun test --silent src/testing/ai-strategy/*.test.ts
RUN_STRATEGY_LAB=1 STRATEGY_PRESET=promotion AGENT=1 bun test --silent src/testing/ai-strategy/*.test.ts
RUN_STRATEGY_BENCHMARK=1 STRATEGY_GAME_COUNT=100 AGENT=1 bun test --silent src/testing/ai-strategy/*.test.ts
bun run test:rules && bun run test:unit

metadata.description: Disney Lorcana TCG engine implementation with an internal runtime core

metadata.scriptContent: bun run i18n:compile && tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist
bun run i18n:compile && bun run i18n:check
bun run format && bun run lint && bun run check-types && bun run test
bun run format && bun run lint && bun run check-types && bun run test
bun run fetch:all-locales && bun run generate-localization

metadata.description: Lorcana-specific type definitions for abilities, effects, and cards

metadata.scriptContent: bun run format && bun run lint && bun run check-types

metadata.description: TypeScript configurations for the Lorcanito monorepo
